title: Woman Charged with Kidnapping in Lincoln County
summary: Amber Marie White, 30, is charged after allegedly kidnapping a child from Denver.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks to child safety and the legal consequences of abduction.

title: Spring Weather Followed by Storm Risk
summary: Warm temperatures are expected this weekend before a cool down brings potential storms next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast, alerting residents to prepare for changing conditions.

title: Stabbing Incident in East Charlotte
summary: One person was stabbed in east Charlotte and taken to the hospital with serious injuries.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violent crime and public safety in the area.

title: Fatal House Fire in Chesterfield County
summary: A house fire in Chesterfield County resulted in one death, leading to an arson investigation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of fire and the potential for arson in the community.

title: Missing Anson County Teen Found Safe
summary: A 19-year-old missing from Anson County has been found safe after being last seen on March 10.
charlotte_impact: Offers relief and underscores the importance of search and rescue efforts.

title: Charlotte Airport Operational During Shutdown
summary: Charlotte Douglas Airport maintains operations despite the government shutdown, with TSA staffing ensuring low wait times.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the airport's resilience during federal disruptions.

title: Fatal Shooting in Hickory; Suspect Arrested
summary: A shooting in Hickory left one dead and two injured; a suspect is in custody charged with murder.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the serious issue of gun violence and its impact on the community.

title: Fatal Hit-and-Run in Charlotte; Driver Sought
summary: A 23-year-old woman died in a hit-and-run on The Plaza; police are seeking the driver who fled on foot.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for responsible driving and the consequences of fleeing the scene of an accident.

title: Pedestrian Critically Injured in Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after being struck by a vehicle on South Tryon Street.
charlotte_impact: Highlights pedestrian safety concerns in high-traffic areas.

title: Shooting Near Loyalty Inn; Residents Demand Closure
summary: Two people were shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, the fifth violent incident this year, prompting calls for the hotel's closure.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community concerns about safety and the impact of local businesses on crime rates.

title: North Carolina Faces Growing Wildfire Threat
summary: Fire leaders warn that rising fire numbers and damage from Hurricane Helene pose challenges for crews across North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to the increasing risk of wildfires and the need for preparedness.

title: Sustain Charlotte Challenges I-77 South Alternatives
summary: Sustain Charlotte launches a public challenge for alternatives to the I-77 South project, citing impacts on greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Encourages community involvement in infrastructure planning and environmental protection.

title: New Traffic Signal Planned Near Fort Mill School
summary: A new traffic signal is planned near Catawba Ridge High School to address safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Improves safety for students and drivers in the school zone.

title: Two Fatalities in Head-On Crash in Lancaster
summary: A head-on collision on Airport Road in Lancaster resulted in the deaths of both drivers.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and the importance of road safety.

title: NC Adults Can Take Road Tests at Private Schools
summary: Adults in NC can now take driver's license road tests at certified private schools, easing DMV wait times.
charlotte_impact: Improves accessibility and convenience for obtaining driver's licenses.
